CustomField.description: Structured composite identifier from the CEQ CE Explorer dataset. Format: {UNIT}--{section}-{group}-{seq} (e.g., BLM---5-42, DOE-1--1-1). Unique within a dataset version. Used as the external ID for upsert during data refresh cycles.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: CEQ CE Explorer structured identifier (e.g., BLM---5-42). External ID for upsert.
CustomField.label: CE Explorer ID
